headline: Kirkwood Pulse • April 15, 2026
overview: Post-game interviews with Oli Marmol, Michael McGreevy, and JJ Wetherholt from the April 14 game provide local fans insights into team performance and strategies, enhancing community engagement with regional sports. The Cardinals won a tense 10-inning game against the Guardians 6-5 at Busch Stadium, overcoming late deficits with key plays including two home runs by JJ Wetherholt and capitalizing on opponent errors, improving their extra-inning record to 4-0 this season, which boosts local fan morale and team standings. Major League Baseball commemorated Jackie Robinson Day on April 15th with league-wide tributes including players wearing number 42 uniforms and a nationally televised Mets vs. Dodgers game, highlighting Robinson's historic impact on baseball and society while engaging local communities through youth events and educational programs.

items.title: Monday’s Game Report: Guardians 9, Cardinals 3
items.excerpt: The Cardinals lost their third game in a row on Monday night, falling to the Cleveland Guardians at Busch Stadium, on a night when they didn't pitch well, made a key error - and got another home run from Jordan…
items.ai_summary: The Cardinals lost 9-3 to the Guardians at Busch Stadium, marking their third consecutive defeat and highlighting ongoing pitching struggles with starters failing to last beyond five innings. Jordan Walker continued his strong offensive performance with a home run, but the team's inability to capitalize on scoring opportunities remains a local concern.
